arguments.summary: Explored project: Connection interface with execute/query, MigrationRunner stub. Tests expect: constructor(connection), add(version, sql), async run() that executes in order and skips already-applied migrations.

next_steps.description: Implement MigrationRunner with add(), run(), and applied tracking in src/migrations/runner.ts

turns.content:
PASS tests/migration.test.ts
  MigrationRunner

arguments.summary: Implemented MigrationRunner in src/migrations/runner.ts. Stores migrations as (version, sql) pairs, tracks applied versions in Set. run() sorts by version, executes unapplied via connection.execute(), marks as applied. All 2 tests pass.
arguments.final_answer: Implemented MigrationRunner in src/migrations/runner.ts. Supports add(version, sql) and async run() that executes migrations in order, skipping already-applied ones. All tests pass.
